creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad Incredible glass-making workshop in London, where you can create your own glass flowers! 🌸 Learn how to melt and shape the different coloured glass in this cosy studio with a lovely team, and create your own flowers, coffee stirrers and even glass rings. It’s so wholesome and therapeutic, share it with someone who would love it!

📍 @zoey_filigree No. 6 Bedlam Mews, London, SE11 6DF
🎟️ Prices from £65 per person for a 1.5 hour workshop, but you can choose to do a class up to 3 hours long too

transcription.text: This is the workshop in London where you can create your very own glass flowers, and it is one of the most therapeutic things I've done. Tucked away in a cosy studio in Waterloo, this is Zoe Filigree, and in their glass making workshop there's a few things that you can choose to make, including glass rings, individual flowers, as well as glass dioramas, which is what we chose to make. And before you begin, the team will run through exactly what you need to do, show you how you melt the glass and how to shape it, and then you're left to create your petals. And the team are right there in case you need some help, which we definitely did, and then we started to get the hang of it. Once you've made your petals, you can start attaching them to build your flower, and I absolutely love how ours turned out. This is such a wholesome activity to do with friends or family. Definitely check it out. Find the details in the caption.
